message.Title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics - Prompt category metrics for Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat

Body.Content:
Viva Insights Copilot Dashboard will start showing Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat prompt category metrics within Copilot Chat (work) insights. #copilotcontrolsystem Updated June 9, 2026: Public preview is now available. We have incorporated initial customer feedback and are continuing to evaluate additional enhancements to the prompt categories, including potential updates to the category set and underlying experience. Based on this ongoing evaluation, we will share further updates regarding future release plans, including General Availability, at a later date. Thank you for your patience.

GA date: June CY2026
